description_long: This is a large, rectangular barn with a prominent gable roof that slopes steeply on both sides, creating a classic triangular profile at the ends. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The front features a wide, sliding barn door mounted on visible metal tracks, suitable for accommodating large equipment or livestock. The structure appears solid and robust, with no visible windows, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The roof is dark and weathered, extending slightly beyond the walls to provide some overhang. The overall design is simple yet functional, typical of agricultural buildings found in rural or peri-urban settings.
description: A large, rectangular barn with a steep gable roof, horizontal wood siding, and a wide sliding front door. The structure is robust and windowless, with a rustic, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide sliding barn door and the triangular gable roof peak.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, uninterrupted expanse of the barn's horizontal wood siding and the overhanging roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the gable end with no visible doors or windows, emphasizing the barn's solid construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the length of the barn and the continuous roofline.
attribute_door_style: single wide sliding door on metal track
attribute_window_arrangement: no visible windows on any side
